SEARCH
Package model

Class Book

java.lang.Object
model.Book
public class Book extends Object
Represents a booking entity containing details about the client, cruise, dates, and prices.
Author:
Iker

  • Constructor Details

    • Book

      public Book()
      Default constructor initializing empty or default values for the booking.

    • Book

      public Book(String idClient, int codCruise, String originCity, String destinationCity, Date startDate, Date endDate, double basePrice, double finalPrice, int roomNumber)
      Constructor initializing a booking with all necessary fields.
      Parameters:
      idClient - The client's identification string.
      codCruise - The cruise code.
      originCity - The city of origin.
      destinationCity - The destination city.
      startDate - The start date of the booking.
      endDate - The end date of the booking.
      basePrice - The base calculated price.
      finalPrice - The final price after any modifications.
      roomNumber - The assigned room number.
